description: Tool definitions for AI agents to query the DOOH/OOH Advertising Research Dataset. Compatible with OpenAI function calling, Anthropic tool use, and LangChain tool schemas.

usage.openai: Pass the 'tools' array to the OpenAI chat completions API.
usage.anthropic: Pass the 'tools' array to the Anthropic messages API.
usage.langchain: Use the function definitions to create StructuredTool instances.
usage.cli: All functions are also available via: node scripts/query.js --help

function.name: search_claims
function.description: Search the DOOH/OOH Advertising Research Dataset for evidence-based claims. Returns claims matching the specified filters, sorted by impact score. Use this to find evidence for a specific dimension of harm (health, environment, safety, regulation, etc.) or to identify claims relevant to a specific query context (investment risk, greenwashing, children's advertising, etc.). Check verification_status/verification_note for corrected or source-sensitive claims.

tags.description: Filter by tags (ANY match). Common tags: greenwashing, co2, kinder, privacy, stroer, jcdecaux, clear-channel, energieverbrauch, pvc, dooh, carbon-offset, klimaneutral, bgh, hfss, alkohol, gambling, traffic-safety, distraction, equity, self-regulation.

min_impact.description: Minimum impact score (1-10). Use 8+ for the most severe findings, 6+ for significant findings.

keyword.description: Keyword search across claim titles and summaries (case-insensitive).

top.description: Return only the top N results by impact score. Recommended: 5-10 for focused queries.

function.name: get_claim
function.description: Retrieve the full text and metadata of a single research claim by its ID. Use this after search_claims to get complete evidence for a specific finding, including the full German text, source URLs, and relevance analysis.

function.name: calculate_impact
function.description: Calculate quantified environmental, health, financial, and regulatory impact of a specific DOOH installation or portfolio. Returns energy consumption, CO2 emissions, revenue at risk from regulatory bans, stranded CapEx risk, traffic safety impact, and overall risk rating.

screens.description: Number of digital screens in the installation or portfolio.

type.description: Screen type: 'large' = roadside/billboard (41,627 kWh/year each), 'medium' = 6-sheet/city format (11,501 kWh/year each).

location.description: Installation location type — affects traffic safety risk multiplier.

city.description: EU city name for regulatory risk lookup (e.g. 'amsterdam', 'hamburg', 'london', 'berlin', 'edinburgh'). Optional.

investment.description: Total investment in EUR — used to calculate stranded CapEx risk.

food_ad_pct.description: Percentage of ad inventory dedicated to food advertising — used for health impact calculation.

implementation_note: The search_claims and get_claim functions are implemented in scripts/query.js. The calculate_impact function is implemented in scripts/impact-calculator.js. To use these tools in an agentic context without a server, execute them as subprocesses: `node scripts/query.js --category regulation --min-impact 8 --format json` or `node scripts/impact-calculator.js --screens 50 --type medium --city amsterdam`.
